items.title: Boeing Stock Rises as Wait Drags on for Fatal 787 Air India Crash Update. What We Know.
items.description: Boeing  stock rose Monday even as investors wait for details from flight data recorders on board Air India flight 171, which crashed on June 12, less than a minute after taking off from an airport in Ahmedabad.  Through Monday trading, it was up about 2% since the Air India crash, and shares of  GE Aerospace  were up about 1% as well.  The company’s GEnx engines powered the Air India plane.
